Liberal or Conservative Oxygen Therapy for Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome.

BACKGROUND: In patients with acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS), the 
National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute ARDS Clinical Trials Network 
recommends a target partial pressure of arterial oxygen (Pao2) between 55 and 80 
mm Hg. Prospective
